General.Name: Wisdom Education International Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: Wisdom Education International Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, operates schools in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. It offers private education for primary, middle, and high schools. The company also engages in the sale of daily necessities and educational materials for school related businesses. In addition, it is involved in educational services comprising extracurricular activities, and study tour. Further, the company engages in information technology outsourcing and educational consultancy services, as well as invests in education activities. The company was formerly known as Wisdom Education Group Company Limited. Wisdom Education International Holdings Company Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Dongguan, China.
General.Address: No. 68 Guangming Da Dao, Dongguan, China
